title: Persil Non Bio Colour Washing Powder 8.4kg Family Pack Gentle Laundry Detergent for Sensitive Skin and Bright Clothes - Deep Cleaning Powder for Colours with Fresh Fragrance and Protection
features: Non Bio Colour Washing Powder 8.4kg offers powerful stain removal while being gentle on sensitive skin making it perfect for families with young children babies or anyone needing a skin-friendly laundry solution

Specially formulated for coloured fabrics this non bio washing powder protects colours from fading while keeping clothes looking bright vibrant and new even after multiple washes in both hot and cold water

Hypoallergenic and dermatologically tested this colour laundry detergent is free from biological enzymes and is ideal for people prone to skin irritation allergies or eczema while still providing deep cleaning action

Clean and fresh fragrance leaves clothes smelling great after every wash enhancing the overall laundry experience while maintaining fabric softness and ensuring long-lasting freshness for all types of garments

Large 8.4kg family pack delivers outstanding value with enough laundry detergent for multiple loads making it perfect for busy households who need reliable effective and affordable fabric cleaning every week
description: Product description Experience powerful cleaning with Non Bio Colour Washing Powder in this large 8.4kg family pack , designed to protect coloured fabrics while delivering outstanding stain removal. Formulated to be gentle on sensitive skin, this non-biological washing powder ensures your clothes stay vibrant, fresh, and clean with every wash. This colour-safe laundry detergent tackles tough stains while preserving the brightness of your coloured garments, making it ideal for everyday washing. Whether you're dealing with food stains, mud, or everyday dirt, this detergent is crafted to break down grime efficiently without harsh enzymes or fading your favourite fabrics. With its clean and fresh fragrance , this powder leaves your clothes smelling pleasant after each wash. It's suitable for families with sensitive skin and babies, offering a hypoallergenic clean that meets the needs of delicate skin without compromising cleaning power. The generous 8.4kg pack provides exceptional value, with enough detergent to handle multiple loads—perfect for busy households. Use it in cold or warm washes and achieve brilliant results every time while extending the life of your coloured clothing. Choose Non Bio Colour Washing Powder for a deep clean, long-lasting freshness, and skin-friendly performance in one powerful laundry solution. Product Includes EPISHED Guide Ingredients Sodium Sulfate
